name: NINA SEAPOP — Catalog / Discovery Metadata
abstract: OGC API Records and STAC Collection metadata record for the NINA SEAPOP seabird colony observation dataset. Encodes discovery metadata including spatial coverage (Norway + Svalbard), temporal extent (2014–present), provider (NINA), license (CC-BY 4.0), and links to both the raw OBIS occurrence API (source mode) and the OIM GeoJSON Features endpoint (target mode). Implements OGC Records with relevant STAC extensions.

sources.title: GBIF dataset — SEAPOP Seabird colonies of Norway
